kits.kit_name_canonical: Wildfire Dancer of the Shattered Line
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A Stormcaller who trades the faction's wide-arc devastation for rapid, close-range fire-strikes that ignite and scatter enemy formations from within their own ranks. Where lightning overwhelms through sheer current, wildfire consumes through speed and dex-driven repositioning, keeping the storm's momentum alive at the point of contact.

A high-tempo melee fighter who rides sustained wind pressure through every strike, keeping blades moving in continuous arcs rather than isolated bursts — the storm's geometry made flesh at close quarters. Within the Stormcallers' formations, the Galewright fills the gaps left by heavier surges, wearing opponents down through relentless dexterous motion across the Broken Field's open ground.

A close-range arcane fighter who channels shadow-current through rapid, flat-amplitude strikes to dissolve enemy formations from within their own lines. Where the Stormcallers use wind and lightning to overwhelm through spectacle, this kit collapses resistance through sustained, grounded shadow discharge—the storm made invisible and intimate.

Where the Stormcallers drive lightning into packed earth, this fighter floods the gap with surging water — wide sweeping rushes that knock footing loose and let the current carry the disruption outward. High-tempo melee built on INT-fed pressure, the tide answers the storm's geometry with its own kind of overwhelm.

Where the storm sets the geometry, this fighter is its anchor — a STR-driven melee presence who churns through packed formations at relentless tempo, holding ground through sheer physical mass rather than elemental discharge. The Stormcallers plant them at the eye of every push, letting the current work the edges while the Fieldbreaker grinds the center flat.

A heavy-footed brawler who drives the storm's charge through direct contact, using raw STR to anchor wide-arc bursts that crack earth and scatter ranks at close quarters. Where others ride the lightning outward, this fighter plants and lets the surge detonate underfoot.

A STR-driven melee striker who plants feet in the churned earth and swings wide arcs of raw physical force, letting the storm's geometry do the rest — no flourish, just the flat, relentless pressure of a body built to collapse formations at close range. Where others call the lightning, this fighter is the ground it runs through.

A high-tempo melee disruptor who reads the wind's shifting geometry mid-swing, letting variable gusts amplify each wide arc into formation-scattering force. Where others in the faction channel current through the earth, this fighter rides the upper surge — wisdom over muscle, pressure over impact.

A high-tempo melee striker who reads the storm's geometry through WIS-driven instinct, unleashing variable holy current in wide arcs that buckle enemy footing before a single blade swings clean. Where others count strikes, this Stormcaller counts the gaps the surge opens.

Where the Chainstrike Stormcallers thread arcing volleys across a field, Ironvane of Ashcrag drives into the gap those strikes open — a slow-coiling melee fighter who converts accumulated pressure into a single, bone-rattling STR detonation that closes the chain at point-blank range. Their role is the grounded terminus: the physical strike that completes the geometry the rest of the fellowship draws in the air.

A heavy-limbed brawler who plants wide and swings wider, converting raw physical momentum into the same arc-clearing force the Stormcallers prize — no current needed when the body itself becomes the disruption. Variable output is the point: each swing reads the formation and adjusts, shattering clusters through accumulated pressure rather than any single decisive blow.

A heavy-armed fighter who plants themselves in the breach and unleashes cascading strikes to rupture enemy cohesion, their strength channeled through wide, deliberate sweeps that leave scorched earth in their wake. They anchor the faction's arc-discharge doctrine by meeting force with force, letting momentum and weight collapse what lightning begins.

A caster-faith warrior whose prayer-driven wind channeling tears through clustered enemies at arm's reach, each sweep of their rosary-weighted staff feeding the Stormcallers' doctrine of elemental overwhelm. Their medium-tempo surges reward positioning and wisdom over speed, letting the gale scatter formation before the next arc strikes.

A grounded melee fighter who reads the terrain's charge before each wide-arc strike, letting accumulated earth-current dictate the moment and weight of impact. Where others swing on instinct, this kit waits for the field itself to signal the surge.

A WIS-driven melee fighter who reads the field's shifting charge before committing weight, releasing wide bursts of holy current in variable measure — tight when the line holds, flooding when it breaks. Rooted in east-asian martial discipline, this Stormcaller lets accumulated pressure do the work, holding the storm's geometry until the moment the formation gives way.

A dexterous mid-range striker who reads the storm's geometry in real time, threading holy current through wide sweeping arcs that disrupt enemy footing before the blade even lands. Where others wait for the surge, this fighter moves with it — tempo high, footwork grounded, each pass redistributing the field's charge across the broken earth.

A ranged striker who draws shadow-thread through the storm's own gaps, threading dex-driven javelin casts between the arc-discharges of their faction-kin to collapse retreating formations. Where Stormcallers overwhelm with width, the Shadowpiercer punches through with velocity and dark precision.

A ranged caster who summons cascading water arcs to interrupt enemy formations, weaving moisture and momentum into rapid multi-target chains that leave opponents drenched and disoriented. Her staff channels the faction's signature arcing geometry through aqueous vectors, trading raw power for precision timing and elemental unpredictability.

A mid-range faith-caster who plants themselves at formation seams and releases holy current in widening arcs, their wisdom-fed surges designed to scatter clustered ranks rather than pierce individual targets. They embody the faction's doctrine: ground yourself, let the storm expand, let chaos do the work.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Earthbound Marksman of the Shattered Line
kits.kit_identity_narrative: Where the Stormcallers surge close, this kit holds the perimeter with rapid percussion fire, anchoring the formation's flank through sustained earthen ballast and steady aim. The rifle's percussion cadence mirrors the faction's elemental rhythm—not the lightning's flash, but the ground's relentless tremor.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Ember Archer of the Shattered Palisade
kits.kit_identity_narrative: Where the Stormcallers' lightning breaks formation, this archer plants rapid volleys of burning shafts into the fractured ranks, maintaining the chaos at distance. Fire and wind work in concert—the storm opens the gap, the ember-flight widens it.

A patient ranged striker within the Chainstrike Stormcallers who holds position and reads the field before releasing a single precise physical shot that arcs through clustered targets with chain-geometry efficiency. DEX-driven and deliberately paced, this kit sacrifices rate-of-fire for spiky burst windows that punish opponents who stack or cluster after dodging the fellowship's elemental barrages.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Galerift Caller of the Scattered Wind
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A patient, DEX-driven ranged combatant within the Chainstrike Stormcallers who holds position and reads the field before releasing sudden, high-amplitude wind bursts that arc unpredictably between targets. Her low tempo belies a spiky lethality — each strike erupts from stillness, threading gust-geometry across the formation before the enemy can reorient.

Where the Chainstrike Stormcallers lean on arc and gust, this ranged caster holds back — gathering heat into a single overcharged bolt of fire that ignites the chain geometry already laid by allies. The long intervals between releases are deliberate: each spiky burst is timed to cascade through an already-disrupted line, converting the fellowship's wind-and-lightning threading into a scorched finish.

A Chainstrike marksman who trades the faction's signature arcing chains for brutal single-impact volleys, each shot a deliberate rupture that punches through armor and resolve alike. Where others in the fellowship weave lightning across crowds, this kit anchors the chain-geometry doctrine through raw kinetic force—the hammer-blow that breaks the rhythm opponents expect.

A deliberate wielder of weighted earth-resonance who anchors the faction's arcing strikes by grounding each chain-lightning volley through bedrock conduits, turning the terrain itself into a focusing lens. Where others chase velocity, this kit trades tempo for precision—each spiky earth-pulse threads deeper into the chain geometry, binding targets in cascading elemental sequence.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Radiant Caller of the Pale Gale
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A deliberate, wisdom-driven striker whose blessed bolts arc outward in slow-building surges, threading holy light through enemy formations the way wind threads gaps in a battlement wall. Within the Chainstrike Stormcallers, this combatant trades raw tempo for concentrated spikes of consecrated force, ensuring each release carries enough sanctified charge to jump unpredictably between targets.

Among the Chainstrike Stormcallers, this combatant holds position at range and reads the wind's shifting geometry with unhurried precision, releasing concentrated gust-arcs only when the chain-path guarantees maximum spread across clustered targets. The long silences between strikes are deliberate — each burst carries the accumulated patience of a practitioner who lets the storm do the threading.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Murk Warden of the Drowned Veil
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A light-footed shadow caller who reads the battlefield's open channels and releases variable-width curtains of dark water at medium cadence, denying ground across wide arcs rather than targeting single marks. Where the Tidal Shadow Wardens flood a flank, this warden is the intelligence behind the spread — adjusting the tide's reach by feel, letting obscured water do the closing work.

A variable-tempo water channeler who floods contested ground with surging curtains of brine-dark obscurement, thinning enemy formations before they can close range. Where others aim at targets, this warden aims at terrain itself, letting the tide decide who drowns in shadow.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Tempest Weaver of the Shattered Ground
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A ranged conductor who calls down variable lightning cascades across the field, their arcane staff amplifying the faction's storm-surge doctrine into waves of arc-discharge that ripple outward to fragment enemy lines. They anchor themselves to earthen footing while hurling surges at medium range, letting the storm's geometry unfold across the broken terrain.

A ranged Stormcaller who reads the storm's geometry from a distance, bending wind-arcs into variable trajectories that scatter formations before the lightning even arrives. Their wisdom shapes the field's pressure rather than its strike, letting unseen currents do the shattering.

A ranged Stormcaller who reads the fractured earth beneath the formation's feet, drawing WIS-driven surges upward through soil and stone to deliver variable-arc discharge across shifting ground. She holds no fixed line, letting the basin's broken terrain dictate the geometry of each strike.
